dlm.lifecyclepolicy.retainrule.Count.Docs: The number of snapshots to retain for each volume, up to a maximum of 1000.

dlm.lifecyclepolicy.retainrule.Interval.Docs: The amount of time to retain each snapshot. The maximum is 100 years. This is equivalent to 1200 months, 5200 weeks, or 36500 days.

dlm.lifecyclepolicy.retainrule.IntervalU.Docs: The unit of time for time-based retention.
